title: India’s beaten-down largecaps set to rebound on foreign flows
summary: Large-cap Indian stocks are expected to narrow their underperformance to smaller peers soon. Foreign investors are returning to Indian equities, boosting large-cap prospects. Attractive valuations and improving earnings outlook support this anticipated market shift. Large caps now trade at a significant discount compared to their smaller counterparts. This trend suggests a potential rotation back into these larger companies.

title: D-St set for a negative opening as GIFT Nifty signals weak start
summary: Indian markets showed resilience on Monday despite global challenges. Domestic fundamentals provided continued support for equities, which are expected to rise. The Q1FY27 earnings season will likely be a key catalyst for market action. Foreign portfolio investors were net sellers, while domestic institutional investors bought shares. The Indian rupee depreciated against the US dollar on Monday.

title: Stocks in news: Tata Elxsi, HCL Tech, ICICI Pru AMC, Biocon, SpiceJet
summary: Indian markets closed nearly unchanged after a volatile trading session on Monday.  Tata Elxsi and L&T Tech shares are in focus as they announce first quarter results.  HCL Tech reported a twenty percent year-on-year net profit growth and declared an interim dividend.  ICICI Prudential AMC also saw a twenty-three percent net profit increase in its first quarter.  SpiceJet faces aircraft deregistration requests, while Biocon plans a significant share sale.

title: Leadership reset revives rerating hopes at Just Dial
summary: Just Dial's stock surged after announcing a transition to professional management.  The company aims to bolster its business-to-business segment and AI capabilities.  Reliance Retail acquired a controlling stake in Just Dial in July 2021.  Since then, revenue and net profit have shown consistent growth.  New leadership faces intense competition requiring focused execution for long-term success.

title: Kotak's Ashok Vaswani highest-paid private bank CEO in FY26 with Rs 17.23 crore cash pay
summary: Ashok Vaswani led private bank executives in fiscal year 2026 compensation.  His pay increased significantly due to stock appreciation rights and new options.  HDFC Bank's Kaizad Bharucha received the highest total package when stock options were included.  Bharucha's compensation exceeded his own boss, Sashidhar Jagdishan, in several categories.  This highlights the substantial impact of stock grants on executive remuneration.

title: Brokerages back SBI Funds IPO, see strong long-term growth and listing upside
summary: Brokerages have recommended subscribing to SBI Funds Management’s Rs 9,813 crore initial public offering (IPO), citing its market leadership, strong earnings growth, healthy return ratios and reasonable valuation relative to listed peers.

title: Capital Boost: SBI stake sales add over Rs 13,500 cr to kitty
summary: State Bank of India anticipates a significant payout from asset management and stock exchange stake sales.  These sales will strengthen the bank's capital position and support future loan expansion.  The bank is selling a stake in its asset management company through an initial public offering.  Later this year, SBI will also offer shares in the National Stock Exchange IPO.  These combined transactions will enhance SBI's net worth and financial flexibility.

title: Goldman Sachs sees Nifty rallying to 26,500, signals nearly 9.5% upside
summary: Goldman Sachs anticipates Nifty's recovery to 26500, indicating a significant upside potential. This outlook stems from lower commodity prices and a stabilized currency, which are positive indicators. Healthy second-quarter earnings expectations also contribute to the improved domestic economic outlook. Foreign investor positioning is ultra-light, suggesting ample room for capital inflows to return. The brokerage recommends investing in banks, tourism, and energy refiners for potential gains.

title: Wage, fuel spike hit ATM cash services in four states
summary: The one-day disruption affected ATM uptime and cash availability across the four states, with intermittent service gaps reported as regular cash replenishment cycles were interrupted. Industry executives, however, said operations are expected to resume from Tuesday after several private sector banks agreed to renegotiate contracts and revise service fees, while discussions with other lenders continue.

title: RBI Deputy Guv pushes for meaningful, fair grievance redressal
summary: The conference brought together IOs from across a representative spectrum of regulated entities including banks, non-banking financial companies (NBFCs), credit information companies (CICs) and other regulated entities, along with MD, EDs and CEOs charge of customer service, as well as RBI Ombudsmen and senior officials of the Reserve Bank.

title: Tata Capital to buy 88.6% in Yogloans, enters gold loan business
summary: Tata Capital’s Yogloans buyout gives it an instant gold-loan platform, adding a high-yield secured product to its retail lending portfolio. This all-cash transaction values Yogloans at up to Rs 318 crore before infusion. The deal gives Tata Capital an operating platform in secured lending products. Yogloans had assets under management of Rs 708 crore as of March 31, 2026. This acquisition provides an immediate branch network and experienced management team.

title: Nifty 50, Sensex prediction today: Check how Indian stock market is expected to trade on 14 July
summary: Nifty 50, Sensex prediction today: The trends on Gift Nifty also indicate a gap-down start for the Indian benchmark index. The Gift Nifty was trading around 24,044 level, a discount of nearly 199 points from the Nifty futures’ previous close.

title: Asian stocks today: Kospi, Nikkei fall over 2% amid ongoing US-Iran war, rising crude oil prices
summary: Asian stocks today: Japan's Nikkei 225 declined 1.17%, while the broader Topix index slipped 0.51%. South Korea's Kospi dropped 2.01%, and the small-cap Kosdaq fell 1.8%.

title: Gift Nifty, US-Iran war, crude oil prices to India inflation: 10 things that changed for Indian stock market overnight
summary: Gift Nifty was trading around 24,049 level, a discount of nearly 193 points from the Nifty futures’ previous close, indicating a negative start for the Indian stock market indices.

title: Crude oil prices jump to one-month high after 10% rally as US-Iran war escalates; Brent oil near $85 a barrel
summary: US-Iran war: Brent crude futures gained $1.68, or 2%, to $84.98 per barrel, while US West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude advanced $1.65, or 2.1%, to $79.79 per barrel.

summary: Elevation Capital joins a growing list of VC firms that have raised, or are in the process of raising, fresh capital over the past year.

title: Oxane Partners' founders eye majority sale at up to $250 mn valuation
summary: The UK-based private credit software firm, built without external funding, has hired Avendus and Jefferies to explore a majority stake sale amid growing investor interest in fintech infrastructure.

title: HCLTech reverses course, bets $365 million on data centre business
summary: HCL Technologies announces a  ₹3,500 crore investment in data centres, shifting from its earlier asset-light strategy. The company reported minor revenue growth in Q1, facing challenges, yet aims to enhance its AI offerings and market position within the tech industry.

title: 8th Pay Commission: Level 1 and Level 10 salaries compared under 2.1, 2.5 and 3.0 fitment factors
summary: The 8th Pay Commission's fitment factor will determine future salary and pension revisions for government employees. Here's how different fitment factor scenarios could impact basic pay, allowances and overall earnings, while highlighting why the final government decision remains crucial.

title: 'Listing is a must': Chinese humanoid startups are rushing to launch IPOs
summary: Shenzhen-based LimX Dynamics is the latest humanoid company in China to raise capital in recent weeks as investors eye IPO exits.
